column5:
Manual UI:
1. Login as an administrator in two browser sessions
2. Open the same proposal detail in both sessions
3. Change status in the first session
4. Try to change status from the stale second session
5. Verify the approved conflict message is shown
6. Verify the screen reflects the latest status and version from the first session
7. Verify the stale requested status is not applied automatically
8. Verify status history has no extra success entry for the stale attempt
column6: The stale request is rejected with the approved safe conflict message, latest state is shown, the first admin update remains effective, and no automatic retry or extra success history occurs

column4: Manual successful status change and history verification
column5:
Manual UI:
1. Login as an enabled administrator in a browser
2. Open /admin/proposals and select one proposal
3. Change the proposal status to a different valid status
4. Verify the success notice is shown
5. Verify the displayed status and version are updated
6. Verify Status History contains one success row with the previous status, new status, changed administrator, and changed time
column6: An enabled administrator can change status and the same screen shows the updated status, incremented version, and success history entry
